parameters.replyMarkup: ={{ $item(0).$node['Validation'].json.resolver_output?.result_type === 'exchange_offer' ? { inline_keyboard: [ [ { text: 'Confirm Exchange', callback_data: 'confirm_exchange' }, { text: 'Cancel', callback_data: 'cancel_exchange' } ] ] } : null }}

parameters.url: ={{(() => { const base = $env.CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL || $env.CONVEX_URL || $env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL; if (!base) { throw new Error('Missing Convex URL env: CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL or $env.CONVEX_URL || $env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL'); } return String(base).replace(/\/$/, '').replace(/\.convex\.cloud(?=\/|$)/, '.convex.site'); })() + '/http/session-save'}}
